statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name // .model.id' | sed -E 's/^Claude //'); dir=$(basename "$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir')"); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); git_info=""; if git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'detached'); git_info="🔀$branch"; uncommitted=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks status --porcelain 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$uncommitted" ]; then files=$(echo "$uncommitted" | head -3 | awk '{print $NF}' | paste -sd ',' - | sed 's/,/, /g'); git_info="$git_info ($files uncommitted"; count=$(echo "$uncommitted" | wc -l); [ "$count" -gt 3 ] && git_info="$git_info +$((count-3)) more"; git_info="$git_info,"; fi; remote=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks rev-parse --abbrev-ref @{u} 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$remote" ]; then ahead=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks rev-list --count $remote..HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 0); behind=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks rev-list --count HEAD..$remote 2>/dev/null || echo 0); last_fetch=$(find "$(git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir)/FETCH_HEAD" -mmin +0 2>/dev/null | xargs stat -c %Y 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$last_fetch" -ne 0 ]; then now=$(date +%s); diff=$((($now - $last_fetch) / 60)); if [ "$diff" -lt 60 ]; then sync_info=" synced ${diff}m ago"; else sync_info=" synced ${diff}h ago"; fi; else sync_info=""; fi; if [ "$ahead" -gt 0 ] && [ "$behind" -gt 0 ]; then git_info="$git_info $ahead ahead, $behind behind)"; elif [ "$ahead" -gt 0 ]; then git_info="$git_info $ahead ahead)"; elif [ "$behind" -gt 0 ]; then git_info="$git_info $behind behind)"; else git_info="$git_info$sync_info)"; fi; else git_info="$git_info)"; fi; fi; used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); if [ -n "$used" ]; then pct=$(printf "%.0f" "$used"); ctx_size=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.context_window_size // 200000'); ctx_k=$((ctx_size / 1000)); filled=$((pct / 10)); empty=$((10 - filled)); bar=""; for ((i=0; i<filled; i++)); do bar+="█"; done; for ((i=0; i<empty; i++)); do bar+="░"; done; token_info="$bar ${pct}% of ${ctx_k}k tokens"; else token_info=""; fi; line1="$model | 📁$dir"; [ -n "$git_info" ] && line1="$line1 | $git_info"; [ -n "$token_info" ] && line1="$line1 | $token_info"; echo "$line1"
